arabic: صَادَفَتْ رِحْلَتِي مَهْرَجَانًا شَعْبِيًّا فِي الْمَدِينَةِ. كَانَتِ الشَّوَارِعُ مُزَيَّنَةً بِالأَضْوَاءِ وَالأَلْوَانِ. عَزَفَتِ الْفِرَقُ الْمُوسِيقِيَّةُ فِي السَّاحَاتِ وَرَقَصَ النَّاسُ بِفَرَحٍ. جَرَّبْتُ الأَكْلَ الشَّعْبِيَّ مِنَ الأَكْشَاكِ الصَّغِيرَةِ. كَانَ مِنْ حُسْنِ حَظِّي أَنِّي زُرْتُ الْمَدِينَةَ فِي هَذَا الْوَقْتِ.
translation: Moje putovanje se poklopilo s narodnim festivalom u gradu. Ulice su bile ukrašene svjetlima i bojama. Muzičke grupe su svirale na trgovima i narod je veselo plesao. Probao sam narodnu hranu s malih tezgi. Bio sam sretan što sam posjetio grad baš u to vrijeme.
translationEn: My trip coincided with a local festival in the city. The streets were decorated with lights and colours. Music bands played in the squares and people danced with joy. I tried local street food from small stalls. I was lucky to have visited the city at that time.
